name: FortiGate VPN SSL User Login Failed
description: Detects failed VPN SSL login attempts on FortiGate devices. This can indicate brute-forcing or other credential attacks.

prompts.prompt: A failed VPN SSL login attempt was detected on a FortiGate device, indicating potential brute-force or credential attack activity. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **User** {user}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **VPN User** {vpn_user}, **Authentication Method** {auth_method}, **Reason** {reason}. Investigate this activity to determine if it's a legitimate user error or a malicious attempt to gain unauthorized VPN access.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the failed VPN SSL login attempt.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate Log ID for the VPN SSL login failure (39426).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account related to the event (often the admin user, but can be empty).

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the failed login attempt originated.

parameters.name: vpn_user
parameters.description: The username used for the VPN connection attempt.

parameters.name: auth_method
parameters.description: The authentication method used for the VPN connection (e.g., 'password', 'certificate').

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: The reason provided by FortiGate for the VPN login failure.
